summary: Role-based Tenant Admin feature testing - 5-role RBAC hierarchy (super_admin > tenant_admin > admin > manager > analyst) with tenant-scoped access control.

get_roles_endpoint.details: Returns all 5 roles (super_admin, tenant_admin, admin, manager, analyst) plus hierarchy array

list_users_cross_tenant.details: super_admin sees all 4+ users across tenants

role_hierarchy_enforcement.details: super_admin CAN assign tenant_admin; CANNOT assign super_admin (403)

invite_hierarchy_enforcement.details: super_admin can invite as admin; cannot invite as super_admin (403)

tenant_list_auth_guard.details: GET /api/tenants/ requires super_admin or tenant_admin token

tenant_stats_auth_guard.details: GET /api/tenants/stats returns 401 without token, 403 for non-super_admin

frontend_super_admin_badge.details: Header shows 'Super Admin' badge in fuchsia color

frontend_tenants_subtab.details: Tenants sub-tab visible with stats cards and tenant table

frontend_role_legend.details: All 5 roles displayed in legend with correct descriptions

frontend_role_dropdowns.details: Role dropdowns show only assignable roles per hierarchy
